query_name:
SELECT
  i_item_desc,
  w_warehouse_name,
  d1.d_week_seq,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p_promo_sk IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_promo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN NOT p_promo_sk IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS promo,
  COUNT(*) AS total_cnt
FROM READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/catalog_sales/*.parquet') AS catalog_sales
JOIN READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/inventory/*.parquet') AS inventory
  ON (
    cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk
  )
JOIN READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/warehouse/*.parquet') AS warehouse
  ON (
    w_warehouse_sk = inv_warehouse_sk
  )
JOIN READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_value/item/*.parquet') AS item
  ON (
    i_item_sk = cs_item_sk
  )
JOIN READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/customer_demographics/*.parquet') AS customer_demographics
  ON (
    cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk
  )
JOIN READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/household_demographics/*.parquet') AS household_demographics
  ON (
    cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
  )
JOIN READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/date_dim/*.parquet') AS d1
  ON (
    cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
  )
JOIN READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/date_dim/*.parquet') AS d2
  ON (
    inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
  )
JOIN READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/date_dim/*.parquet') AS d3
  ON (
    cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
  )
LEFT OUTER JOIN READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/promotion/*.parquet') AS promotion
  ON (
    cs_promo_sk = p_promo_sk
  )
LEFT OUTER JOIN READ_PARQUET('/home/cc/tpcds_cluster_base/catalog_returns/*.parquet') AS catalog_returns
  ON (
    cr_item_sk = cs_item_sk AND cr_order_number = cs_order_number
  )
WHERE
  d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq
  AND inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity
  AND d3.d_date > d1.d_date + INTERVAL '5' DAY
  AND hd_buy_potential = '>10000'
  AND d1.d_year = 1999
  AND cd_marital_status = 'D'
GROUP BY
  i_item_desc,
  w_warehouse_name,
  d1.d_week_seq
ORDER BY
  total_cnt DESC NULLS FIRST,
  i_item_desc NULLS FIRST,
  w_warehouse_name NULLS FIRST,
  d1.d_week_seq NULLS FIRST
LIMIT 100
